socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect

Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 78 to 117 Added Fire Damage
